channel.title: Intro to ML
channel.description: Recent content on Intro to ML

item.title: About
item.description: Welcome to my blog! I’m Khaled, a software engineer with a deep passion for outdoor adventures, and continuous learning. Here, I share my journey, insights, and the exciting things I’ve learned. A Bit About My Journey I graduated from the University of Colorado Boulder with a Master’s degree in Computer Science. During my time there, I delved into the depths of algorithms, data structures, and the fascinating world of machine learning.

item.title: How I would learn the basics of ML in 10 days
item.description: Learn Machine learning basics in 10 days
